title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 95.160 - Provisions of sections 95.115 to 95.155, scope of
text:
95.160.  Provisions of sections 95.115 to 95.155, scope of. — The provisions of sections 95.115 to 95.155 shall apply to all cities, towns and villages in this state, whether organized by special charter or under the general laws of the state, any provision in any special charter of any city, town or village in the state to the contrary notwithstanding.
(RSMo 1939 § 7372) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7221; 1919 § 8660; 1909 § 9548
